name: Peachy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the chicken in flour.
2. Place the chicken in a baking dish.
3. Melt together white wine, butter, and water.
4. Pour the melted mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
6. Add sliced peaches and chopped walnuts.
7. Bake an additional 1/2 hour until finished.
